query:
UPDATE products p 
JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
SET p.availableAtPalladium = FALSE 
WHERE s.categoryId IN (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name LIKE '%Rice%' OR name LIKE '%Sweet%');
